parameters.content:
## Outreach.io -> fact_outreach_sequence_daily  (engagement, snapshot)

SETUP AFTER IMPORT:
1. "Outreach: Get Sequences" is pre-wired to the "Outreach Sequence" OAuth2 credential
   and sends Accept: application/vnd.api+json.
2. Region + pillar are parsed from the CWSI naming convention
   (UK&I->UKI, BeLux, NL ; Secure X / Copilot->AI / Data Security->Data /
    UEM->Endpoints / SecOps+Threat Protection->Operations).
   Use SEQUENCE_MAP in the Code node ONLY to override a sequence the parser gets wrong.

BEHAVIOUR:
- Funnel = prospect-level unique counts: prospects=numContactedProspects,
  opens=prospectOpenCount, clicks=prospectClickCount, replies=numRepliedProspects.
- Counters are LIFETIME totals -> activity_date = run date (snapshot; same-day re-run upserts).
- Test/Dummy sequences are skipped. meetings=0 (meetings/SQL/pipeline come from Salesforce).
- Grain: one row per sequence per day. Engagement %s are computed in the dashboard view.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_outreach_sequence_daily
  (activity_date, sequence_id, sequence_name, region_id, pillar_id,
   prospects, opens, clicks, replies, meetings, enabled, source)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $4),
  (SELECT pillar_id FROM dim_practice_pillar WHERE pillar_name = $5),
  $6, $7, $8, $9, $10, $11::boolean, 'outreach')
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_outreach_seq_grain DO UPDATE SET
  sequence_name = EXCLUDED.sequence_name,
  region_id     = EXCLUDED.region_id,
  pillar_id     = EXCLUDED.pillar_id,
  prospects     = EXCLUDED.prospects,
  opens         = EXCLUDED.opens,
  clicks        = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  replies       = EXCLUDED.replies,
  meetings      = EXCLUDED.meetings,
  enabled       = EXCLUDED.enabled,
  loaded_at     = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('outreach', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, 0, 0);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Map Sequences → Fact Rows').all().length, $('Map Sequences → Fact Rows').all().length ] }}

parameters.content:
## CC-6 prospect membership -> fact_outreach_prospect (BATCHED)

ADDITIVE branch (sequence-engagement branch untouched).
Get Sequences -> Pick Marketing Sequences (1 item per non-test seq WITH prospects)
-> Loop Over Sequences (batch 20) -> Get Sequence States -> Map -> Upsert -> back to Loop.

MEMORY: batching + sparse fieldset `fields[prospect]=emails` keep RAM flat
(the unbatched full-prospect fetch OOMs on 121 sequences).
Per HTTP call = ONE sequence (filter[sequence][id]), single page[size]=1000 (no sequence
has >1000 prospects, so no pagination needed -> no loop risk).

VERIFY: scope prospects.read; prospect email at attributes.emails[0].

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_outreach_prospect
  (prospect_id, sequence_id, email, sequence_name, region_id, state, added_at, loaded_at)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $5),
  $6, $7, now())
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT pk_outreach_prospect DO UPDATE SET
  email = EXCLUDED.email,
  sequence_name = EXCLUDED.sequence_name,
  region_id = EXCLUDED.region_id,
  state = EXCLUDED.state,
  added_at = EXCLUDED.added_at,
  loaded_at = now();
